title: NIST AI RMF
summary: Operationalizes the NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0: GOVERN / MAP / MEASURE / MANAGE controls + cited practice obligations. Open-source.

conditions: understand and manage legal/regulatory requirements involving AI

items.citation_text: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented.

conditions: document roles and responsibilities for AI risk management

items.citation_text: Roles, responsibilities, and lines of communication for AI risk management are documented.

conditions: foster a culture of AI risk management and accountability

items.citation_text: Organizational practices are in place to foster a critical-thinking, risk-aware culture.

conditions: establish and understand the AI system context and intended purpose

items.citation_text: Context, intended purpose, and categorization of the AI system are established and understood.

conditions: assess impacts on individuals, groups, communities, and society

items.citation_text: Likelihood and magnitude of impacts to individuals, groups, and society are assessed.

conditions: document test sets, metrics, and evaluate the AI system

items.citation_text: Test sets, metrics, and details of the AI system evaluation are documented.

conditions: evaluate the AI system for safety risks

items.citation_text: The AI system is evaluated for safety risks and failure modes.

conditions: track identified AI risks over time

items.citation_text: Approaches and mechanisms to track identified AI risks over time are in place.

conditions: prioritize and respond to identified AI risks

items.citation_text: AI risks are prioritized, responded to, and managed based on assessment and tolerance.
Post-deployment AI system monitoring plans are implemented, including incident response.

items.title: Govern
items.requirement: Policies, roles, and a risk-aware culture for AI.

items.title: Measure
items.requirement: Identify metrics and evaluate the AI system.

items.title: Manage
items.requirement: Prioritize, respond to, and monitor AI risks.
